description: Risk taxonomy for Plaid-powered fintech agents — account linking, balance checks, transactions, transfers, and identity verification

plaid_auth.description: Plaid Auth: Retrieve bank account numbers for ACH. Low direct risk, sensitive data.

plaid_balance.description: Plaid Balance: Real-time balance checks. Read-only, lowest risk.

plaid_transactions.description: Plaid Transactions: Retrieve transaction history. Read-only.

plaid_identity.description: Plaid Identity: Retrieve account owner identity info. PII access.

plaid_income.description: Plaid Income / Payroll: Income verification. Sensitive financial data.

plaid_transfer.description: Plaid Transfer: Initiate ACH transfers via Plaid. High risk — moves money.

plaid_link_token.description: Plaid Link: Token creation and exchange. Account linking setup.

plaid_item_mgmt.description: Plaid Item Management: Add, update, or remove linked bank items.

plaid_liabilities.description: Plaid Liabilities: Retrieve credit card, mortgage, and loan data.

plaid_investments.description: Plaid Investments: Retrieve investment holdings and transactions.
